name: Divino AI Wine System - Lead Orchestration

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ ({ model: $env.OPENWEBUI_MODEL || 'qwen', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'Sei Divino Business Agent, consulente AI per enoteche, ristoranti, ecommerce vino e piccole aziende vinicole. Rispondi sempre in JSON valido con subject, body, internal_note, next_action.' }, { role: 'user', content: `Crea una email follow-up per questo lead: Nome=${$json.name || ''}, Email=${$json.email || ''}, Tipo attivita=${$json.businessType || ''}, Problema=${$json.problem || ''}, Obiettivo=${$json.goal || ''}, Sistema consigliato=${$json.recommendedSystem || $json.system || ''}, Risultato quiz=${typeof $json.quizResult === 'string' ? $json.quizResult : JSON.stringify($json.quizResult || {})}` } ], response_format: { type: 'json_object' } }) }}

={{ ({ name: $json.name || '', email: $json.email || '', business_type: $json.businessType || '', problem: $json.problem || '', goal: $json.goal || '', segment: $json.segment || 'business', recommended_system: $json.recommendedSystem || $json.system || '', quiz_result: $json.quizResult || {}, agent_name: $json.agent || 'business_agent', agent_action: $json.action || 'business_pro', agent_subject: $json.generatedSubject || '', agent_body: $json.generatedBody || '', internal_note: $json.internalNote || '', next_action: $json.nextAction || '', source: 'quiz_business', status: 'new' }) }}

values.json: ={{ ({ ...$json, emailDelivery: { enabled: false, provider: 'AgentMail', status: 'todo', note: 'Configure a real delivery node before going live.' } }) }}
={{ ({ ok: true, message: 'Lead ricevuto e workflow AI avviato', action: $json.action, system: $json.recommendedSystem || $json.system, nextAction: $json.nextAction }) }}
